FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.45sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fa065db9640>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-25T00:23:33Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-25T00:21:40Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-25T00:23:33Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-25T00:21:40Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170465260 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170472811 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170513151 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170513992 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170533340 {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170534362 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170547491 new <- list()
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170548212 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170557746 new$width <- width
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170558187 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170567721 new$height <- height
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170568232 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170577676 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170578116 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170594671 new$title <- title
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170595562 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170611155 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170611966 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170669611 new$version <- version
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170670773 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170684413 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170686036 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170700807 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170701709 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170715369 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170716070 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170731663 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170732344 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170745774 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170746926 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170800134 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170801045 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170821486 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170832662 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170833413 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170871179 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170884969 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170904538 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170905319 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170917637 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170918068 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170927642 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170928133 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170941232 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170941713 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170951347 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170951838 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170966179 "default"))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170980039 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170980841 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170992668 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170993119 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171002733 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171003164 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171012587 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171013028 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171023073 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171023504 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171036653 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171037634 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171051014 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171051675 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171063533 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171063963 domain = NA)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171074118 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171074599 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171083502 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171083943 old$family <- family
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171093797 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171094258 version <- old$version
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171108198 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171109000 "2.0")
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171122309 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171123141 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171139525 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171140156 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171150952 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171151402 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171161918 domain = NA)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171162449 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171173004 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171173505 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171188427 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171189318 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171207625 invisible()
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171208496 }

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170513151 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170533340 {

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170558187 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170567721 new$height <- height
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170568232 if (!missing(onefile))

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170611155 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170611966 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170669611 new$version <- version
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170670773 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170684413 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170686036 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170700807 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170701709 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170715369 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170716070 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170731663 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170732344 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170745774 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170746926 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170800134 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170801045 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170821486 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170832662 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170871179 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170904538 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170917637 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170918068 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170927642 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170928133 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170941232 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/25 00:25:03.170966179 "default"))
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170980039 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170980841 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/25 00:25:03.170992668 }

2026/06/25 00:25:03.171012587 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/25 00:25:03.171023073 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171023504 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171036653 }
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171037634 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171051014 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/06/25 00:25:03.171063533 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171063963 domain = NA)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171074118 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171074599 }

2026/06/25 00:25:03.171083943 old$family <- family
2026/06/25 00:25:03.171093797 }

2026/06/25 00:25:04.502251522 new$paper <- paper

2026/06/25 00:25:04.502267946 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/06/25 00:25:04.502288296 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/25 00:25:04.502299443 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/25 00:25:04.502299883 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/25 00:25:04.502309107 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/06/25 00:25:04.502399450 if (!missing(producer))

2026/06/25 00:25:04.502414272 new$author <- author
2026/06/25 00:25:04.502428173 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
